rulings.Case Title: ARJUN DHINGRA VS. COUNTRYWIDE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Reconsideration Of Order Granting Motion Vacating Order Sustaining The Demurrer To Complaint And Dismissing Action
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday January 22, 2013, line 1 - PLAINTIFF ARJUN DHINGRA's Motion For Reconsideration Of Order Granting Motion Vacating Order Sustaining The Demurrer To Complaint And Dismissing Action. Deny. Failed to present new facts. Plaintiff's declaration lacks any supporting evidence. Additionally plaintiff should have been able to save $160,256.95 (monthly payments of $4,578.77 from March 2010 to January 2013) which would enable a bond. Plus no authority that defendant could retain proceeds of foreclosure sale if plaintiff prevailed in quiet title. =(501/REQ)
